name: Vercel AI Chatbot
focus: AI workspace and chat product patterns
teaches: chat layout composition for real products
how to integrate AI into a serious product shell
avoid: mistaking chat chrome for the whole workflow
copying AI aesthetics without matching the product job
why_this_matters: A practical official source for AI product UI that feels productized instead of prototype-like.
reusable_lesson: AI chat works best when tied to a visible workflow and artifact surface.

name: assistant-ui
focus: tool-call UX and structured AI chat
teaches: how to make AI interactions feel structured and enterprise-grade
avoid: over-designing chat UI while neglecting the surrounding product
assuming a chat library defines the full UX strategy
why_this_matters: Strong source for the mechanics of serious AI chat and tool interaction patterns.
reusable_lesson: AI credibility increases when messages, tools, and outputs belong to one coherent system.

name: OpenAI Apps in ChatGPT
teaches: how apps can fit naturally into conversation
how AI products mix natural language and interactive UI
how ecosystems and extensible AI surfaces should be framed
inspect: how conversational UI and interfaces are combined
avoid: treating announcement pages as complete UI systems
forcing every AI feature into a marketplace model
why_this_matters: Useful for understanding AI product UX that combines conversation with interactive interfaces.
reusable_lesson: Conversation gets stronger when real interfaces appear at the right moments instead of everything staying as text.

name: OpenAI Codex
focus: agent workflows and parallel task UX
teaches: how to explain multi-step AI work clearly
avoid: using overly technical framing for general audiences
hiding agent behavior behind abstract marketing copy
why_this_matters: Useful when designing AI products that behave more like workers than chatbots.
reusable_lesson: Agent UX should explain workflow and outputs clearly, not just the intelligence behind them.

name: Claude Code
teaches: how to keep AI coding products task-oriented
avoid: making AI coding products feel magical but opaque
using too much concept and too little workflow clarity
why_this_matters: Useful for AI tools where trust, control, and task clarity matter more than decorative UI.
reusable_lesson: AI power feels more trustworthy when the workflow is concrete and inspectable.
